name: xcpGetCalPage
title: xcpGetCalPage
syntax: void OnXcpGetCalPage(char ecuQualifier[], byte reserved0, byte reserved1, byte pageNr);
description: If the XCP slave device supports calibration data page switching, this command gets the currently active page and access mode.
The callback returns the currently active calibration data page of the ECU.

parameters.name: ecuQualifier
parameters.description: Name of the device, configured within the CANoeXCP/CCP Window.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: Access mode of the currently active page. The values may be 0x01 (ECU access) or 0x02 (XCP access). All other values are invalid.

parameters.name: pageNr
parameters.description: Logical data page number. Usually 0 identifies the page in RAM and 1 the page in FLASH memory. CANoe.XCP can only work on parameters stored in RAM.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
